channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tributes pour in after sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham
item.description: The flood of tributes for Senator Lindsey Graham, who died suddenly on Saturday evening, highlighted the reach of his legacy.

item.title: Nancy Mace considers Senate run to succeed Lindsey Graham
item.description: South Carolina Representative Nancy Mace is weighing a campaign for the Senate seat left open after Lindsey Graham's sudden death on Saturday.

item.title: The Brilliance of the U.S. Constitution
item.description: The Founders understood that freedom is essential for dignity and prosperity.

item.title: Civic Education Key to Preserving American National Identity
item.description: A shared civic tradition is what uniquely unites Americans.
